textByHash.54b27a18f964bb708cef7457e649021b3a7c2305: Oh... Well, I was hoping to join a new crew, but I had no luck at Phasmatys. The ghosts there didn't seem to like me much... I thought maybe someone here would have a boat instead, but it seems not.
textByHash.ab39532e8500afbcb89053a40c49f38ec616e1bd: Right... Not very helpful to me then, are you?
textByHash.d3708ae14e272262de690c925d51dbc4aa7b2f98: I don't think so. You're not fit to lead a pack.
textByHash.1224a8429fc91c1fbbc89795171d309cdc0873f3: Hmm... Okay, I'll join your pack, but don't make me regret it.
textByHash.3b09972db6740e39c087f915ac09aa8e1b9f2100: Yes, still trying to find a new crew.
